fixes.explanation: Bare 'except:' catches everything including SystemExit. Use 'except Exception as e:' at minimum.

Mutable defaults (list/dict/set) are shared across all calls.
Replace with None and assign inside the function:
  if items is None:
      items = []

items.title: 🧠 Bubble Sort Detected (Line 7–8)
items.message:
Bubble Sort detected (lines 7–8).
Reason: Nested loops with element comparison and swap — classic Bubble Sort pattern.
Complexity: Best O(n) / Avg O(n²) / Worst O(n²)
Space: O(1)
